# CWE-358 vulnerable: Improperly Implemented Security Check for Standard (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-358-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func ExtractBearerClaims(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	raw := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
	if raw == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing authorization", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	token := strings.TrimPrefix(raw, "Bearer ")
	parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
	payload, _ := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
	var claims map[string]interface{}
	_ = json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims)
	out, _ := json.Marshal(claims)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.Write(out)
}
